title: Client Boostium
description: Set of mods to optimize client
body: ### 💡About Set of mods that improve performance of the Clinet without breaking vanilla parity. Vanilla Minecraft mostly run single threaded, this modpack makes it mostly multithreaded ### ☑️ Features - ✨ Shaders Preinstalled - 🪟 Borderless fullscreen window - 👅 Instant Language Reload - 🛜 Better Network Connection - 🟥 Faster Redstone Logic - 🔥 Particle Rendering is asynchrouns - 🛠 Asynchronous processing of entities - 🌍 multithreaded chunk generation - 🧠 Memory Optimizations - ✅ Issues with packets fixed - ⚡ 100% faster lighting engine - 🏰 Faster structure generation - 📁 Server Logic Optimized - ⚒️ Gaps In Models are fixed - 🌱 Faster loading in to the world # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server?
